$comment: FC7 C2 (D-FC7-STRUCT-BY-VALUE-ARG-RETURN): x86_64 Win64 (ms_x64) struct by-value across the by-SIZE classes — P=8B (pow2) in ONE GPR (arg + return), T=12B (>8) by-reference arg + SRET return, Three=3B (non-pow2) by-reference / SRET. Win64 has no SSE/HFA: a small aggregate is an integer of its size. add2(P{20,1})+sum3(T{6,7,0})+sumc(Three{2,3,3}) = 21+13+8 = 42 via non-inlined mk(). Runs NATIVELY on Windows (x86_64-PE).
